case_title: ISAAC EVANS ET AL VS. 100 VAN NESS ASSOCIATES, LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS ISAAC EVANS AND DANIEL JECK ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT 100 VAN NESS ASSOCIATES, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN SIELBACH (PROPERTY MANAGER). NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFFS. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
